revision_history.changes: Initial script, outline, storyboard, PPTX. 26 scenes, ~9:48 runtime, 8-video series.

Garfield trimmed from ~3min/8scenes to ~60s/5scenes. Grant expanded (+Julia quote, +Homer painting). Wilson expanded (+Hughes election night, +nomination photo). Series restructured from 8 to 5 videos. Hayes/Harrison cut as standalone episodes. Title simplified. Netflix nod added. Runtime reduced to ~7:52.
